summary: Whitespace handling correctly implemented with comprehensive test coverage.

implementationReview.approach: Pattern updated with ^\s* for leading whitespace, \s*:\s* for flexible colon spacing, and updated trailing empty line cleanup to handle whitespace-only lines.

requirements: Match leading whitespace on the line
fulfillmentCheck.notes: Unit tests in hook.test.ts cover all 8 whitespace variation scenarios. Tests verify regex matching for leading spaces, leading tabs, multiple spaces, no space, space before colon, and mixed variations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Unit tests added for pattern matching in src/utils/hook.test.ts using bun:test framework.
sharedStateObservations.suggestedAction: Document test framework usage in library.
